message:
Running command: 
# STA running in parallel for multiple corners. Steps 78-83 completed, step 83 STA running.
# This is a full PnR run that will take many hours (same as before).
# 
# Let me check synthesis results before returning.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Synthesis step 77 outputs ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/77-yosys-synthesis/"
echo ""
echo "=== Synthesis report ==="
cat "$RUN_DIR/77-yosys-synthesis/reports/"* 2>/dev/null | head -50

echo ""
echo "=== Check for chip module in netlist ==="
grep -c "mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip" "$RUN_DIR/77-yosys-synthesis/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.nl.v" 2>/dev/null || echo "chip module not found (expected - it's not synthesized)"

echo ""
echo "=== Instance count in new netlist vs old ==="
OLD_NL=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/02-yosys-synthesis/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.nl.v" 2>/dev/null)
NEW_NL="$RUN_DIR/77-yosys-synthesis/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.nl.v"
[ -f "$NEW_NL" ] && wc -l "$NEW_NL" || echo "New netlist not yet available"
